title: Earthy Flaky Polish Chocolate Bake
description: A lowfat, flaky pastry filled with rich dark chocolate and a hint of cinnamon, perfect for a cozy Polish dessert.
instructions: In a small saucepan, gently melt the chocolate over low heat, stirring until smooth. Set aside to cool slightly.
Whisk the almond milk, applesauce, egg white, and vanilla extract in a bowl until well combined.
In a separate bowl, combine whole wheat flour, oat flour, baking powder and salt. Add the wet mixture and stir until a soft dough forms.
Press the dough into a greased 22 cm square baking tin, creating a 1 cm thick base. Bake for 10 min to set the crust.
Remove from oven and spread the melted chocolate over the crust. Sprinkle the walnuts and cinnamon on top.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 15 min, or until the chocolate sets and the top is slightly golden.
Let cool in the tin for 5 min, then cut into 6 squares. Serve warm or at room temperature.
